note.zh: 主要技术栈，从项目架构设计到成果物交付
note.en: The main cross-platform delivery stack right now, well suited for business apps, internal tools, and lightweight product launches.

note.zh: 围绕 Flutter 长期使用，主要负责业务建模、异步流程和工程结构整理。
note.en: Used long term around Flutter, mainly for domain modeling, async flows, and keeping the project structure clean.

note.zh: 用于处理原生桥接、机型问题排查，以及复杂业务场景下的能力补位。
note.en: Used for native bridges, device-specific debugging, and filling gaps when product scenarios need lower-level platform support.

note.zh: 用于 iOS 端轻量页面和原型实现，强调状态驱动和简洁的交互表达。
note.en: Used for lightweight iOS screens and prototypes, with a focus on state-driven UI and concise interaction design.

note.zh: 适合表单密集型小程序和轻应用项目，重点在流程稳定和提交流畅。
note.en: A pragmatic fit for form-heavy mini-programs and lightweight apps where stable flows and smooth submissions matter most.

note.zh: 主要用于后台占位和接口支撑，服务于客户端联调与基础业务能力实现。
note.en: Mainly used for backend scaffolding and API support to unblock client integration and basic business capabilities.
